scope: SPEC-GL-FUSION-31B-V5 end-to-end build: Phase 0 verifier through Phase 2 SFT + inference test

purpose: Reconcile V5 spec against codebase before any compute

context: Phase 0 verifier built per Section 5.1 + Section 8 — added forward + backward + optimizer.step + post-step forward + 10-iter GPU-util loop

result: GREEN 28/28 in 102.7s, peak 86.3GB / 150GB ceiling, 0 distributed warnings

claim_text: Phase 0 verifier MUST exercise loss.backward + optimizer.step + post-step forward; forward-only smoke tests pass even when generation/training paths are broken
evidence: V5 Phase 0 caught optimizer-step interactions that forward-only would miss

claim_text: GPT-5.x reasoning models reject `max_tokens` parameter; use `max_completion_tokens` instead. 400 BadRequestError otherwise.
evidence: Cat 5 smoke labeling failed all 12 GPT-5.4 calls until parameter renamed

claim_text: Local Django mgmt commands against Railway PG die with admin-kill on long sessions. Pattern: chunk in batches of ~500, call connection.close() between batches, use --append flag for accumulating S3 outputs.
evidence: Cat 1 extract failed 5 times before chunking; succeeded with seeds 1-13 across 4 chunks

claim_text: Tigris/Railway S3 requires explicit endpoint_url in boto3 client; only pass when env var is non-empty (empty string breaks boto3).
evidence: Cat 5 seed upload failed with InvalidAccessKeyId until endpoint_url added; pattern from CLAUDE.md confirmed

purpose: Diagnose Phase 2 attempt 3 degenerate training (real_pct=0, gates frozen at 0.001)

claim_text: GL-Fusion corpus extraction must follow Stream A export, not precede it. If corpus PKs > Stream A's max PK, _build_graph_data returns None for all rows → augmentation pool fallback → real_pct=0% → text-only fine-tune. V5 lost 95% of Cat 1/2/6 to this.
evidence: PK overlap check: 6.0% / 5.6% rows had >=2 resolved PKs in Cat 2

claim_text: Stream A retrain only re-trains EpiGNN weights on existing topology. To pick up new Object PKs, first re-export entity_map.tsv + triples.tsv from Django, THEN retrain. Otherwise gnn-export's max PK stays stale.
evidence: Stream A re-export 04/19 didn't add PKs > 137,537; corpus had PKs in 143-146K range

suggestion: Path A filter (drop unresolved Cat 1/2/6 rows)
result: Filtered 5805 → 247 rows for those cats; total corpus 8069 → 6375; real_pct jumped 0% → 55%

claim_text: GL-Fusion zero-init gates need cold-start intervention. With spec §4.3 zero init + standard graph LR (5e-5), gates stay frozen at ~0.002 (10× below spec §5.3 minimum 0.02) even with 55%+ real_pct. Chicken-and-egg failure. Fix candidates: gate-specific high LR (10×), init gates at 0.01, or two-phase optimizer.
evidence: Cat 3+4 had 100% PK resolution but gates still froze at 0.0021 throughout 6300 SFT steps

claim_text: Modal `app stop` on ephemeral apps may cancel subsequent same-named dispatches. Wait briefly between stop and re-dispatch, or use distinct app names per dispatch.
evidence: Cat 1 stop killed Cat 8 dispatch; needed re-fire under different conditions

claim_text: Modal .map() worker preemption can kill orchestrator functions silently mid-iteration, leaving partial S3 state. Always pair .map() orchestrators with explicit resume logic that reads existing output AND a watchdog that re-dispatches if orchestrator dies.
evidence: Cat 1 fanout died at 1100/2454 rows after preemption, needed re-dispatch with resume

claim_text: Phase 0/1/2 GL-Fusion verifiers exercise forward + loss.backward only — never model.generate(). Inference path can be completely broken even when training metrics look healthy. Must run a separate inference smoke test against the base model BEFORE training, or you only discover post-Phase 2.
evidence: V5 Phase 1+2 trained successfully; first generate() call produced gibberish (la la la, LC0C0C0)

claim_text: google/gemma-4-31B-it cannot generate text via transformers.generate() on this stack. Tested all of: attn_implementation eager AND sdpa, greedy AND temperature sampling, repetition_penalty, apply_chat_template, manual <start_of_turn> formatting, mm_token_type_ids passthrough, base.model.language_model.generate (which doesn't exist on Gemma4TextModel). All produce gibberish. Model only generates via vLLM (multimodal-Gemma-specific kernels).
evidence: Five separate diagnostic dispatches against vanilla base, no LoRA, all gibberish; existing gemma_a31b_inference.py uses vLLM and works

claim_text: GNN store's runtime dim is data-determined. Stream A base is 160d (h_content 128 + h_epistemic 32) but grows to 416d when GeoMoE + TGN variants exist on S3. Inference wrappers that hardcode gnn_dim=160 will fail to load 416d-trained checkpoints with shape mismatch on gnn_projector.
evidence: test_v5_inference attempt 1 crashed loading gnn_projector ([5376, 416] vs [5376, 160])

purpose: Distill 9 V5 lessons into one-line additions for the team CLAUDE.md

suggestion: Add 9 V5 gotchas to CLAUDE.md GL-Fusion section
result: Applied — 9 lines added under new 'GL-Fusion 31B V5' subsection in /Users/travisgilbert/Tech Dev Local/Creative/Website/CLAUDE.md

tension_text: V5 spec §4.3 mandates zero-init gates AND §5.3 requires gate_max ∈ [0.02, 0.8] within 5000 SFT steps. These are incompatible without a cold-start intervention (high gate-specific LR, non-zero init, or two-phase optimizer) which the spec does NOT mandate.

GL-Fusion training stack uses transformers (forward+loss path) but production inference uses vLLM (custom multimodal-Gemma kernels). vLLM does not support GL-Fusion wrapper modules (mp_modules, ca_modules, fusion_gates). Result: a trained GL-Fusion model cannot be served with its graph-fusion modules active via vLLM. Either build custom PyTorch inference, write vLLM extension, OR use a base model whose transformers.generate() works.

status: shippable as text-only LoRA via vLLM; GL-Fusion modules dormant (gates 0.002)
rev 1 with Appendices C/D/E (Phase 0 results, Streams A/B/C results, audit trail)
complete with 8 new lessons (9-16) for V5.1
10,229 rows total (8069 graph-grounded after Path A filter to 2415; 900 conv; 2160 Opus reasoning)

outcome: V5 trained but architecturally non-shippable as true GL-Fusion. 16 lessons captured for V5.1.
